steps.t: Frodo Baggins is on the crest of the hill of Cerin Amroth with some of the members of his company. Milwen has asked you to speak with Frodo Baggins, o…
Samwise Gamgee is standing on the crest of the hill of Cerin Amroth next to Frodo. Frodo has asked that you fill him and Sam in on news of Eriador.
Meriadoc Brandybuck is taking a walk somewhere in the vicinity of the hill of Cerin Amroth, and he may now be resting in a private garden nearby. Frod…
